negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_55d37941-01e3-4df6-bc48-170d2eb939c6
prompt: In the video, a man stands in front of multiple containers and platters of food, engaging in a demonstration or presentation. The man has short, black hair and wears a light purple button-down shirt with the top button open and his sleeves rolled up, along with a white over-the-ear microphone on his right ear, as he speaks throughout the video. He looks downward at a white container, placing its transparent top on it, and then wipes his hands with a cloth before removing the top again. He briefly turns his head to look and speak at a piece of black recording equipment coming in from the left before returning his gaze to the container, turning it around. He then hovers his right hand in front of him, taps once on an obscured object with his index finger, and slightly extends his left arm before wiping his finger on the cloth again. The camera remains static in a medium shot at eye level throughout the entire video.  The setting is well-lit, with the light highlighting the man and the food as he stands in front of a black backdrop. To the right is a green background with orange and light olive colorations at the top, featuring a large, white "S" with the word "Healthy" in the same color below it in the middle, though the rest of this background is obscured. Multiple sandwiches and sliced pieces of watermelon and honeydew lie on the surface to the left on white plates. The sandwiches are wrapped in white and red paper, and to their right is a basket with white cloth over it and a plastic container with an orange substance inside it. The piece of recording equipment is visible from the beginning but is pulled back away from the frame toward the end of the video.
